test.name: Locality guide for Pennsylvania, late 1800s — coal mining records
test.description: Checks if the skill recognizes Pennsylvania’s coal mining industry and directs researchers to employment records, union lists, census schedules, and church registers.

input.user_message: I’m researching ancestors in Pennsylvania coal mining towns during the late 1800s. What records or repositories would help trace families?

judge_context: Must mention coal mining industry context. Must highlight employment registers, union rolls, census, and church records. Must not suggest modern HR databases or statewide vital registration as the main source.
